parameters-en.Interval: Sets the pitch of the effected signal in semitones, from 2 octaves down to 2 octaves up.
parameters-en.Cents: Sets the pitch of the effected signal in cents, from -50.0 to +50.0.
parameters-en.Delay: Delays the pitch-shifted signal slightly. At lower values, it can thicken up your tone or at higher values, it can kind of emulate strumming from a single note.
parameters-en.Shift Level: Controls the level of the pitch-shifted signal.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the pitch-shifted signal and the dry signal. At 0%, no pitch-shifted signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Shift Pan: Controls the panning of the pitch-shifted signal between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Dry Pan: Controls the panning of the dry signal between the left and right channels.
